---
title: "Parallel History of France and England, consisting of Outlines and Dates, A By C.M. Yonge."
---

## Parallel History of France and England, consisting of Outlines and Dates, A By C.M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1871
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
